rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.description: Each room is uniquely designed with hand-painted Andean murals, warm lighting, and artisan textiles that celebrate Cusco's cultural heritage.

map.title: Find Us in Cusco
map.description: Located in the heart of San Pedro, steps from the historic market and a short walk to Plaza de Armas.
